attacking_style: Attacks inside final 2-3km on medium climbs or positioning phases rather than explosive accelerations on steep gradients. Prefers tactical opportunism in compressed GC scenarios to pure climbing dominance.
team_tactics: Limited domestique support evident; often relies on others' wheels for pacing in critical GC moments. Team occasionally sets early tempo but this has backfired, leaving him isolated when selection happens.
terrain_preference: Time trials (won Romandie ITT by 30+ seconds) and sustained moderate climbs suit him best. Vulnerable on steep 10%+ gradients and explosive accelerations; cannot match pure climbers on decisive sustained efforts.
vulnerability: Illness and extreme weather repeatedly cause abandonment or severe performance drops. Mechanicals have disrupted GC campaigns multiple times. Loses significant time when top climbers accelerate on steep gradients (10%+).
key_patterns: Abandoned or fell ill in multiple Grand Tours (Giro 2020, 2023; illness/mechanical pattern across seasons)
Strong time trial capacity delivers stage wins and GC gains (Romandie ITT win, Tour de Suisse yellow)
Dropped on steep sustained climbs when pure climbers attack (Bernal, Roglic examples across 2021-2022)
Late-race relies on others' wheels for GC defense rather than independent riding (Vuelta 2023 DENZ example)
Mechanical/equipment issues recur at critical GC moments (Giro 2021, Paris-Nice 2021)
Attacks inside final 3km on medium climbs showing tactical positioning over pure power
form_trajectory: negative: 2022 Tour described as 'shell of former self', 2023 Giro abandonment, 2023 Vuelta required others' wheels for top-10 defense. Peak form appears to have been 2021-early 2022.
